clue: The Holder'S Water-Type Moves By Power boost item
extract: The Sea Incense (Japanese: うしおのおこう Seawater Incense) is a type of held item introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation IX, it was an incense that allowed Marill and Azumarill to produce Azurill Eggs. In battle, its effect is identical to the Mystic Water.
